##NAMES=Quadridavyne
##RRUFFID=R141084
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=[(Na,K)_6_Cl_2_][Ca_2_Cl_2_][(Si_6_Al_6_O_24_)]
##LOCALITY=Mt Vesuvius, Naples Province, Campania, Italy
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ch. and H. Schäfer
##DESCRIPTION=Short hexagonal prismatic white crystals, associated with sodalite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 25.729 b: 25.729 c: 5.359 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 3072.3 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
